lines.english: Lesson 24
lines.chinese: 第24课
lines.raw: Lesson 24 | 第24课

lines.english: Beauty
lines.chinese: 美
lines.raw: Beauty | 美

lines.english: What do glimpses of beauty, either in nature or art, often suggest to the human mind?
lines.chinese: 无论是自然还是艺术中的一瞥之美，常常给人类心灵带来怎样的启示？
lines.raw: What do glimpses of beauty, either in nature or art, often suggest to the human mind? | 无论是自然还是艺术中的一瞥之美，常常给人类心灵带来怎样的启示？

lines.english: A young man sees a sunset and,
lines.chinese: 一个年轻人看到日落，
lines.raw: A young man sees a sunset and, | 一个年轻人看到日落，

lines.english: unable to understand or to express the emotion that it rouses in him,
lines.chinese: 无法理解或表达它在他心中唤起的情感，
lines.raw: unable to understand or to express the emotion that it rouses in him, | 无法理解或表达它在他心中唤起的情感，

lines.english: concludes that it must be the gateway to a world that lies beyond
lines.chinese: 便断定它一定是通往一个彼岸世界的门户。
lines.raw: concludes that it must be the gateway to a world that lies beyond | 便断定它一定是通往一个彼岸世界的门户。

lines.english: It is difficult for any of us in moments of intense aesthetic experience
lines.chinese: 在强烈的审美体验时刻，我们任何人都很难
lines.raw: It is difficult for any of us in moments of intense aesthetic experience | 在强烈的审美体验时刻，我们任何人都很难

lines.english: to resist the suggestion that we are catching a glimpse of a light
lines.chinese: 抗拒这样一种暗示：我们正瞥见一道光，
lines.raw: to resist the suggestion that we are catching a glimpse of a light | 抗拒这样一种暗示：我们正瞥见一道光，

lines.english: that shines down to us from a different realm of existence, different and,
lines.chinese: 它从一个不同的存在领域向我们照耀，一个不同且，
lines.raw: that shines down to us from a different realm of existence, different and, | 它从一个不同的存在领域向我们照耀，一个不同且，

lines.english: because the experience is intensely moving, in some way higher.
lines.chinese: 因为这种体验极其动人，在某种程度上更高。
lines.raw: because the experience is intensely moving, in some way higher. | 因为这种体验极其动人，在某种程度上更高。

lines.english: And, though the gleams blind and dazzle, yet do they convey a hint of beauty and serenity
lines.chinese: 而且，尽管这些微光令人目眩神迷，它们却传达了一种美和宁静的暗示，
lines.raw: And, though the gleams blind and dazzle, yet do they convey a hint of beauty and serenity | 而且，尽管这些微光令人目眩神迷，它们却传达了一种美和宁静的暗示，

lines.english: greater than we have known or imagined. Greater too than we can describe;
lines.chinese: 超越了我们已知或想象的一切。也超越了我们所能描述的；
lines.raw: greater than we have known or imagined. Greater too than we can describe; | 超越了我们已知或想象的一切。也超越了我们所能描述的；

lines.english: for language, which was invented to convey the meanings of this world
lines.chinese: 因为语言是为了传达这个世界的意义而发明的，
lines.raw: for language, which was invented to convey the meanings of this world | 因为语言是为了传达这个世界的意义而发明的，

lines.english: cannot readily be fitted to the uses of another.
lines.chinese: 无法轻易地适用于另一个世界的用途。
lines.raw: cannot readily be fitted to the uses of another. | 无法轻易地适用于另一个世界的用途。

lines.english: That all great art has this power of suggesting a world beyond is undeniable.
lines.chinese: 所有伟大艺术都具有暗示一个彼岸世界的力量，这是无可否认的。
lines.raw: That all great art has this power of suggesting a world beyond is undeniable. | 所有伟大艺术都具有暗示一个彼岸世界的力量，这是无可否认的。

lines.english: In some moods, nature shares it.
lines.chinese: 在某些心境下，大自然也分享着这种力量。
lines.raw: In some moods, nature shares it. | 在某些心境下，大自然也分享着这种力量。

lines.english: There is no sky in June so blue that it does not point forward to a bluer,
lines.chinese: 六月的天空，没有一片蓝不会指向更蓝；
lines.raw: There is no sky in June so blue that it does not point forward to a bluer, | 六月的天空，没有一片蓝不会指向更蓝；

lines.english: no sunset so beautiful that it does not waken the vision of a greater beauty,
lines.chinese: 没有一轮日落如此美丽，以至于它不会唤起对更伟大美的憧憬，
lines.raw: no sunset so beautiful that it does not waken the vision of a greater beauty, | 没有一轮日落如此美丽，以至于它不会唤起对更伟大美的憧憬，

lines.english: a vision which passes before it is fully glimpsed,
lines.chinese: 一种尚未完全捕捉便已消逝的憧憬，
lines.raw: a vision which passes before it is fully glimpsed, | 一种尚未完全捕捉便已消逝的憧憬，

lines.english: and in passing leaves an indefinable longing and regret.
lines.chinese: 并在消逝中留下一种难以名状的渴望与遗憾。
lines.raw: and in passing leaves an indefinable longing and regret. | 并在消逝中留下一种难以名状的渴望与遗憾。

lines.english: But, if this world is not merely a bad joke,
lines.chinese: 但是，如果这个世界不仅仅是一个糟糕的玩笑，
lines.raw: But, if this world is not merely a bad joke, | 但是，如果这个世界不仅仅是一个糟糕的玩笑，

lines.english: life a vulgar flare amid the cool radiance of the stars,
lines.chinese: 生命不是群星凉爽光辉中一道庸俗的闪光，
lines.raw: life a vulgar flare amid the cool radiance of the stars, | 生命不是群星凉爽光辉中一道庸俗的闪光，

lines.english: and existence an empty laugh braying across the mysteries;
lines.chinese: 存在也不是在奥秘中咆哮的空洞笑声；
lines.raw: and existence an empty laugh braying across the mysteries; | 存在也不是在奥秘中咆哮的空洞笑声；

lines.english: if these intimations of a something behind and beyond
lines.chinese: 如果这些关于某种在后和在上的暗示
lines.raw: if these intimations of a something behind and beyond | 如果这些关于某种在后和在上的暗示

lines.english: are not evil humour born of indigestion,
lines.chinese: 不是消化不良产生的恶趣味，
lines.raw: are not evil humour born of indigestion, | 不是消化不良产生的恶趣味，

lines.english: or whimsies sent by the devil to mock and madden us, if, in a word
lines.chinese: 也不是魔鬼送来嘲弄和使我们发狂的怪念头，如果，一言以蔽之，
lines.raw: or whimsies sent by the devil to mock and madden us, if, in a word | 也不是魔鬼送来嘲弄和使我们发狂的怪念头，如果，一言以蔽之，

lines.english: beauty means something yet we must not seek to interpret the meaning.
lines.chinese: 美有所指，那么我们就不必去诠释它的意义。
lines.raw: beauty means something yet we must not seek to interpret the meaning. | 美有所指，那么我们就不必去诠释它的意义。

lines.english: If we glimpse the unutterable, it is unwise to try to utter it,
lines.chinese: 如果我们瞥见了不可言说之物，试图言说它是不明智的，
lines.raw: If we glimpse the unutterable, it is unwise to try to utter it, | 如果我们瞥见了不可言说之物，试图言说它是不明智的，

lines.english: nor should we seek to invest with significance that which we cannot grasp.
lines.chinese: 我们也不应试图赋予我们无法把握的事物以意义。
lines.raw: nor should we seek to invest with significance that which we cannot grasp. | 我们也不应试图赋予我们无法把握的事物以意义。

lines.english: Beauty in terms of our human meanings is meaningless.
lines.chinese: 就我们人类的意义而言，美是无意义的。
lines.raw: Beauty in terms of our human meanings is meaningless. | 就我们人类的意义而言，美是无意义的。
